name: io.github.selic/mcp-itglue
title: IT Glue
description: IT Glue MCP server for MSPs — documents, flexible assets, semantic vector search, RBAC, and BYOK

environmentVariables.name: ITGLUE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: IT Glue API key (Account → Settings → API Keys)

environmentVariables.name: ITGLUE_REGION
environmentVariables.description: IT Glue region: us, eu, or au

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key — enables semantic vector search tools

environmentVariables.name: AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Azure OpenAI API key — enables vector search via Azure (requires AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT)

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model or Azure deployment name

environmentVariables.name: VECTOR_INDEX_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path of the persisted vector index file
